ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXSmall (XXS)) */,
  "suitable_chest_size_min" INTEGER /* Minimum chest size suitable for this size */,
  "suitable_chest_size_max" INTEGER /* Maximum chest size suitable for this size */,
  "body_bust" INTEGER /* Body bust measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "waist_min" INTEGER /* Minimum waist measurement in inches */,
  "waist_max" INTEGER /* Maximum waist measurement in inches */,
  "sleeves" REAL /* Sleeve length in inches */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "size_description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Tops, Bottoms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the clothing item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the clothing item */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color of the clothing item */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the clothing item */,
  "item_length" REAL /* Length of the clothing item in inches */,
  "item_width" REAL /* Width of the clothing item in inches */,
  "item_height" REAL /* Height of the clothing item in inches */,
  "fabric_weight" REAL /* Weight of the fabric used for the clothing item in ounces */,
  "item_season" TEXT /* Season for which the clothing item is designed (e.g., Spring, Summer, Autumn, Winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the logo of the brand */,
  "web_url" TEXT /* URL to the website of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "rgb_value" TEXT /* RGB value of the color (e.g., R,G,B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "material_season" TEXT /* Season for which the material is suitable (e.g., Spring, Summer, Autumn, Winter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_sizes" (
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item-size combination */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item-size combination in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the item-size combination is stored */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level of inventory at which the item-size combination should be reordered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item-size combination to reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_sizes_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the warehouse */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the manager in charge of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "birthday" TEXT /* Birthday of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the order is denominated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item-size combination */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item-size combination in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the item-size combination */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "item_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the order item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_size_id") REFERENCES item_sizes ("item_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order item being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, processed) */,
  "return_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes_fit_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit guide */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "guide_description" TEXT /* Description of the fit guide */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image of the fit guide */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video of the fit guide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_fit_guides_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite item */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the favorite item */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the item was added to favorites */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred category */,
  "preferred_color_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred color */,
  "preferred_material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred material */,
  "style_notes" TEXT /* Additional style notes for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the feedback is about */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* Suggestions from the customer for improvement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order status update */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the order status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_status_history_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "item_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item-size combination */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., addition, subtraction) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_transactions_item_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_size_id") REFERENCES item_sizes ("item_size_id")
)
